title: Cobblemon Bonus Textures
description: Adds a handful of alternate textures for Cobblemon pokemon to bring more variety into your world.
body:
A resource/data pack that adds visual variants to certain pokemon from the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod.

<details>
<summary>Pokemon Lines Included</summary>
‎Rattata (+ Alolan)
Voltorb (+ Hisuian)
Cyndaquil (+ Hisuian/Hisui-Bias)
Mareep
Deerling (+ All 4 seasons)
</details>



---
‎ 

### Guide:
**TO INSTALL:** Put a copy of this folder in your ```.minecraft/resourcepacks``` folder, and put another copy in your ``.minecraft/saves/YourWorldName/datapacks`` folder.

To summon them specifically with commands, each pokemon will have most of their variants listed under the first evo's name. For example, ```/pokespawn electrode voltorb-ball=net``` will summon an electrode with a net ball pattern.


If you happen to dislike one variant, you can replace it in the pack's files by copying in the regular texture and renaming it to the one you don't like (Or you can edit the .json files if you're feeling up to it). And if you don't want variants for a certain pokemon, just go in and delete all of its folders.
